---
title: "Project Memory"
format: gfm
---

## Product Direction

- Build a native macOS app with a straightforward desktop UI.
- Focus on reviewing temporary files and large files, then moving them to Trash rather than deleting them permanently.
- Keep the app practical and low-friction for everyday cleanup.

## Repo Rules

- Do not add any "made by codex", "built with codex", or similar AI attribution text anywhere in the product, repo, issues, pull requests, or release artifacts.
- Use Dave F. Murray ownership and identity only.
- When tagging or mentioning on GitHub, use `@davefmurray`.
- Keep issue, PR, and bug language direct and product-focused.

## Delivery Notes

- Prefer shipping a usable `.app` bundle in `dist/`.
- Prefer build scripts that work with the local macOS toolchain available in this repo.
- Keep deletion reversible by sending files to Trash.
